0.text: Diffuse emphysematous changes throughout both lungs

1.text: Cylindrical bronchiectasis with peribronchial thickening in the lower lobes of both lungs

2.text: Cylindrical bronchiectasis with peribronchial thickening in the middle lobe of the right lung

3.text: Cystic bronchiectasis in the lower lobes

5.text: Bronchiectasis associated with soft tissue density changes in the upper lobe of the right lung

6.text: Bronchiectasis associated with structural distortion in the upper lobe of the right lung

7.text: Widespread tree-in-bud opacities in both lungs
